title: Shulker Accessory
description: Equip shulker boxes as wearable accessories. Carry up to three on your hip slots and open them without placing. Supports Sophisticated Storage and Easy Shulker Boxes.
body:
# Shulker Accessories


Equip up to three shulker boxes as accessories and pop them open *wherever*, **whenever**

## How it works

- Three dedicated accessory slots for any shulker box variant
- Press **B** to open your first equipped shulker, with tabs to switch between them
- Right-click a held shulker to open it in-place instead of placing it down
- Crouch+right-click still places normally

## Sophisticated Storage

[Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage) shulker boxes work in the accessory slots and open with their native inventory and settings UI, so you get full access to the inventory on the go.

SS upgrades that depend on the shulker being a placed block neighbor, like hopper I/O, won't function while equipped. Pump and block-converter style world-targeting upgrades are disabled while equipped because targeting blocks at the player's feet is too surprising. Other item/internal upgrades, including pickup handling, are supported as accessory behavior.

## Easy Shulker Boxes

Works well alongside [Easy Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes) for tooltip previews and inventory interactions on vanilla shulkers. Three-way compatibility between this mod, ESB, and Sophisticated Storage is WIP.

## Compatibility

- Requires [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories)
- Requires NeoForge 1.21.1 (21.1.219+)
- [Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage) is optional, all 6 tiers supported
- [Easy Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes) a nice recommendation. Works out of the box for vanilla shulkers,

## Credits

Builds on ideas from [ShulkerBoxSlot](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulker-box-slot) and [Advanced Shulkerboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-shulkerboxes), rebuilt with the [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories) API.

## License

GPL-3.0-or-later
